name: Creative Egg-(baked Potato with Poached Egg and Smoked Salmon)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the sour cream, snipped chives, and white wine. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
2. Slice open the tops of the baked potatoes and squeeze out any excess potato juice.
3. Place 4 just-poached eggs on each potato slice.
4. Arrange julienned smoked salmon over the eggs, creating a criss-cross pattern.
5. Using a squeeze bottle or a teaspoon, drizzle the sour cream sauce made in step 1 over the salmon and around the potatoes.
6. Garnish decoratively with snipped chives, finely-diced red onion, and caviar.
7. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
